title: pelargonium × malvaceum
intro: Pelargonium × malvaceum, also known as Cape Geranium or Barberton Geranium, is a hybrid plant species of the genus Pelargonium, which is a member of the Geraniaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Pelargonium × malvaceum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
